metadata.title: Upsales CRM API - Complete Endpoint Field Documentation
metadata.description: Comprehensive documentation of all API endpoints with required, optional, and returned fields
metadata.authentication: Required via cookie token or Authorization header

opportunities.note: Uses same model as orders, just different probability constraint

POST.required: Same as orders, but stage probability must be 1-99

GET_item.returns: Same as list plus soliditet, growth, clientQuotas, priceList

required.field: projectId OR filter OR segmentId OR segments
required.notes: At least one target required unless isDraft=true

PUT.notes: Cannot update if status is PROCESSING or SENT

optional.notes: str, int, cur, cal, txt, chk, cbo, dat, tel, tim, per, eml, lnk, dis, sel, usr, urs

customfields_contacts.description: Custom field definitions for contacts (same structure as accounts)

customfields_orders.description: Custom field definitions for orders (includes roles and stages)
customfields_orders.note: Has additional fields: formulaVisible, formula, roles, stages

customfields_orderrows.description: Custom field definitions for order rows

customfields_activities.description: Custom field definitions for activities (includes isTodoField)

contactcategories.description: Categories for organizing contacts (same structure as clientcategories)

contactCategoryTypes.description: Types for contact categories (same structure as clientCategoryTypes)

optional.notes: Custom field IDs for order rows

required.notes: createOnly, must be divisible by intervalPeriod

DELETE.notes: Only works with Halon mail accounts

required.notes: Event score (set to 0 for reject-listed clients)

GET.returns: Binary file content with Content-Type, Content-Length, Content-Disposition headers

POST_add.description: Add or remove contacts from segments

POST.notes: Accepts single object or array for bulk create
Accepts single object or array for bulk create

flowContacts.description: Retrieves contacts within a specific flow step or flow completion status

report.description: Dynamic reporting API that generates aggregated data reports for any entity type using Elasticsearch

listViews.description: Manages custom list views for entities stored in Redis

activityList.description: Unified search endpoint for activities, appointments, and emails using Elasticsearch

adAccounts.description: Manages advertising account configuration for a customer

adCampaigns.description: Manages advertising campaigns including budget, targeting, creatives, and status lifecycle

adCreatives.description: Manages ad creatives (banners, images, HTML5) used in campaigns

adCredits.description: Provides read-only access to the customer's ad credit balance

adLocations.description: Provides read-only access to geographic targeting data (countries and regions) for ad campaigns

roleSettings.description: Retrieve role settings with template data and related information

userInvites.description: Manage user invitations stored in Redis with expiration

body.notificationIds: array of notification IDs to mark as read

notificationSettings.description: User-specific notification preferences for reminders and notifications

integrationLog.description: Standard integration execution logs with callback tracking
integrationLog.permissions: Administrator only for GET single and UPDATE operations

standardIntegrationUser.description: User-specific configuration for standard integrations with encrypted storage

industries.description: Returns a list of Swedish industry codes (SNI codes) with their descriptions

staticValues.description: Provides access to static enumeration values used throughout the system

lookup.description: Provides aggregated lookup values for fields across different entity types

journeySteps.description: Returns the available journey steps (lifecycle stages) for clients and contacts

journeyStepHistory.description: Returns the history of journey step changes for a specific client or contact

findProspect.description: Find prospects from external data sources (Soliditet/CreditSafe)

bulk.description: Bulk save prospecting companies to Upsales

groupStructure.description: Retrieve company group structure from external data sources

suggestions.description: Get AI-powered suggestions for prospecting existing customers

signalsFeed.description: Retrieve signals feed (news, events, company changes) for prospecting

quickSearch.description: Quick search across multiple entity types with a single query string

export.description: Export entity data to file formats (CSV/Excel)

emailDuplicates.description: Check for duplicate contacts with the same email address

emailSuggest.description: Suggest email addresses for contacts based on company domain and contact name

emailSuggestion.description: AI-powered email content suggestions for mail threads, appointments, and support tickets

salesboardCards.description: Manages salesboard card configurations for custom salesboard views

scoreboard.description: Provides scoreboard data for tracking client engagement, activities, opportunities and orders

onboardingImports.description: Manages onboarding import processes for standard integrations

marketRejectlist.description: Manages rejected companies for marketing campaigns

links.description: Retrieves dynamic links for entities with tag translation

visits.description: Tracks website visits from identified or anonymous users

GET.permissions: Administrator, mailAdmin, or specific visit by id

GET.description: Forwards query params to provisioning service

POST.description: Forwards request body to provisioning service

triggerAttributes.description: Returns available trigger attributes for workflow automation across various entities

GET.returns: Object with entity names as keys, each containing arrays of trigger attribute objects

translateTags.description: Translates tag placeholders in text using entity data

userDefinedObject1.description: User-defined custom object for storing flexible, custom entity data. Supports associations with clients, contacts, projects, users, and roles.

userDefinedObject2.description: Second user-defined custom object (same structure as UserDefinedObject1)

userDefinedObject3.description: Third user-defined custom object (same structure as UserDefinedObject1)

userDefinedObject4.description: Fourth user-defined custom object (same structure as UserDefinedObject1)

userDefinedObjectCategoryTypes.description: Category types for UserDefinedObjectCategories (POST and PUT disabled)

userDefinedObjectDefinition.description: Definition endpoints for creating and deleting UserDefinedObject configurations

unreadNotifications.description: Get count of unread notifications for a specific user

whatIsMyIp.description: Returns the IP address of the requesting client

returns.description: Client IP address from x-forwarded-for or connection remoteAddress

importMailCampaign.description: Import a mail campaign with status SENT (for historical/external campaign data)

POST.notes: Always creates campaign with status=SENT. Creates MailBodySnapshot for body content.

importMailEvent.description: Import mail events (open, click, etc.) for existing mail campaigns

returns.description: Events that failed with error messages

POST.notes: Automatically looks up mailId from contactId and mailCampaignId. Invalid events returned in skippedEvents.

doceboSSO.description: Generate and redirect to signed SSO URL for Docebo training portal

returns.description: Redirects to signed Docebo SSO URL

GET.notes: Uses upsales-base integration.sso.docebo to generate signed URL

lookerSSO.description: Generate signed SSO URL for Looker embedded analytics (dashboards, looks, explores)

GET.permissions: Explore access requires admin or LookerExploreAccess parameter and looker feature flag
GET.notes: Session length: 1 hour. Embeds user permissions and currency settings in signed URL.

placeholder.description: Returns placeholder HTML content for specific features (deprecated/incomplete endpoint)

GET.notes: Always returns error: 'No feature specieified!' (typo in original). Appears incomplete (TODO in code).

contract.description: Manages legal contract terms and versions for integrations and customers

PUT.notes: Automatically sanitizes markdown, increments version by 1

contractAccepted.description: Records of user acceptance of contract terms

triggers.description: Workflow automation triggers that execute actions based on events and criteria

soliditetSearch.description: Preview search results from Soliditet database (Swedish company data)

soliditetSearchBuy.description: Purchase multiple companies from Soliditet (bulk buy)

soliditetClients.description: Manage Soliditet client data (purchase and refresh company information)

soliditetMatcher.description: Find and match clients with Soliditet/Prospecting databases

soliditetMatcherSearch.description: Search for company matches across Upsales, Soliditet, and Prospecting

reportWidget.description: Retrieves compiled widget data with filtering and grouping

reportWidgetMetadata.description: Retrieves metadata about available widget types

returns: Widget metadata with type, groupBy, groupByOptions, feature requirements

reportClientCompanyType.description: Aggregated company type data from Soliditet with order information

resourcesDownloadInternal.description: Download internal documents with access control

resourcesUploadInternal.description: Upload internal documents with folder organization

imageCompose.description: Compose/modify images (e.g., add YouTube play buttons)

standardIntegrationSettings.description: Standard integration settings with config management

mailByThread.description: Retrieve mails grouped by thread (latest per thread)

mailCampaignInfoPreview.description: Preview campaign statistics for contact eligibility

formsExternalLeadSource.description: Generate external lead source validation script for forms

leads2.description: Alternative leads endpoint with scoring metrics (read-only)

socialEventsDefaultTemplates.description: Default email templates for social events

accountManagerHistory.description: Updates account manager history for clients

accountManagerHistorySpecific.description: Change account manager for specific agreement

clientIpInfo.description: Check client IP information for ad tracking

mailEditor.description: Authenticate with BEE mail editor service

resetScore.description: Reset marketing score for client or contact

sendBeam.description: Send push notifications to mobile devices

standardIntegrationData.description: Standard integration operations (test, values, config, OAuth, events)

systemMail.description: Send system emails from predefined templates

validatePage.description: Validates webpage contains Upsales tracking script

eventsPrior.description: Retrieve prior events for an entity

importMailCampaignMail.description: Import mail records for campaign contacts

mailMulti.description: Create and send multiple emails in batch

returns: Array of entities using template (Flow, Form, MailCampaign)

common_patterns.dates: YYYY-MM-DD for date-only, ISO 8601 for datetime
common_patterns.computed_fields: Fields like userRemovable, userEditable are computed based on permissions
common_patterns.pagination: Use limit and offset query params, max limit typically 50-2000

notes.authentication: All endpoints require authentication via cookie token or Authorization header
notes.feature_flags: Many endpoints require specific feature flags to be enabled for the customer
notes.validation: Field-level validation occurs in model validate methods, see API_REQUIRED_FIELDS.md for details
